money_type_id.text: ประเภทการชำระ

root.sql:
SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name
,(select si_security_user.user_sign from si_security_user where si_security_user.user_id = 'treasurer' ) as treasurer_sign ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_cnt_m_coop.treasurer_name ) as treasurer_name
,(select si_security_user.user_name from si_security_user where si_security_user.user_id = sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id ) as user_name ,(select si_security_user.user_sign from si_security_user where si_security_user.user_id = sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id ) as user_sign
,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no) as member_name ,sc_com_m_receipt.remark ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,(select sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name from sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ) as money_type_name ,sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ( (select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) ) as thai_sum_item_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,'DD/MM/YYYY') as receipt_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_com_m_receipt.calcint_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') as calcint_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_com_m_receipt.share_stock + nvl( ( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and item_type_id in ( 'SB' , 'SL' ) ) , 0 )
- decode( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,'TNL' , recept_amount , 0 ) as share_stock
,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id , 'CHQ' , 'ใบเสร็จจะสมบูรณ์เมื่อเช็คเรียกเก็บเงินได้' , 'TRB' , 'โอนชำระผ่าน ' || (select bank_name from sc_fin_m_bank where bank_fin = sc_com_m_receipt.fin_bank ) ||' ' || (select pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_fin_m_bank.bank_id_code , 'XXX-X-XXXXX-X' ) from sc_fin_m_bank where bank_fin = sc_com_m_receipt.fin_bank ) || '#'|| sc_com_m_receipt.remark , 'CLR' , 'หักกลบลบหนี้ สัญญา ' || sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no || ' ยอดอนุมัติกู้ ' || ( select trim( to_char( loan_approve_amount , '999,999,990.00') ) from sc_lon_m_contract where loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no )|| ' บาท' || ' เงินรับจริง ' || ( select trim( to_char( real_recieve , '999,999,990.00') ) from sc_lon_m_contract where loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no )|| ' บาท' , sc_com_m_receipt.remark ) as remark_footer
,(select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) as sum_item_amount
,'ที่อยู่ 400 ถนนประชาชื่น แขวงทุ่งสองห้อง เขตหลักสี่ กรุงเทพมหานคร 10210' as coop_address ,sc_cnt_m_coop.address ,sc_cnt_m_coop.road ,sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code, sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code) as district_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code) as province_name ,sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode
,nvl(( select sum(sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance) from sc_dep_m_creditor where sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = '66' ),0) as deposit_balance
,(select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.balance) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0) as sum_balance ,(select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_notpay) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0) as sum_interest_notpay
,sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.entry_date ,sc_cnt_m_status_01.status_code ,decode( sc_cnt_m_status_01.status_code , '0' , 'ต้นฉบับ' ,'สำเนา' ) as copy_desc FROM sc_com_m_receipt , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_cnt_m_coop , sc_cnt_m_status_01
WHERE sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_cnt_m_status_01.status_code in ( '0' ,'1' ) --and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = 'ก49000066'
/*WHERE*/
ORDER BY sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ASC ,sc_cnt_m_status_01.status_code

r_mwa_com_special_prapa_spec_nest.sql:
SELECT /*decode( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id , 'IS', ( select insurance_desc from sc_mem_m_insure_rule where sc_mem_m_insure_rule.insurance_type = loan_type ) ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ) as description , */ sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id, sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.balance, sc_com_m_receipt_item.period, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_arrear, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_notpay
FROM sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_receipt
WHERE sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 --and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = 'พ6607009'
and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = {0}
